name: מלפפון
prompt:
E-commerce grocery catalog photo of fresh cucumber.

ARRANGEMENT: 3 cucumbers lying naturally side-by-side, slightly overlapping. Items fill most of the frame and are touching or lightly overlapping — not floating apart in empty space.

BACKGROUND: Plain white or very light neutral — clean, simple, uniform. No props, no surface texture, no colored backdrop.

PRODUCE SURFACE: Completely dry. No water droplets anywhere. No condensation. No dew. No wet shine. Natural matte or slightly waxy skin texture only.

LIGHTING: Soft, diffused, even from above. No directional spotlight. No dramatic side shadows. Very minimal shadow under the produce only.

STYLE: Real photograph of real produce. Natural color variations and slight imperfections in shape are expected and correct. NOT a 3D render. NOT CGI. NOT an illustration. NOT a beauty shot or advertisement.

STRICTLY NO: water drops, condensation, reflections, dramatic shadows, decorative props, text, labels, watermarks, macro close-up, oversaturation, artificial perfection.
